purpose: Ground-truth manifest for scripts/run-calibration.js --fixture mutant-notes-summarizer — one entry per intentionally injected defect, in classes deliberately distinct from mutant-brief-writer's four. Never edit anchor_quote to match a 'fixed' SKILL.md; the defects are the fixture.

defects.description: The frontmatter description restricts activation to one exact phrase, so paraphrased and semantic-variant requests that plainly want a notes summary will fail to trigger the skill.
defects.anchor_quote: Use this skill only when the user says the exact phrase "summarize the meeting notes file"

defects.description: Step 2 instructs running scripts/notes/extract-actions.js, a script that does not exist anywhere in the repository, so the documented extraction step cannot be executed as written.
defects.anchor_quote: Run `node scripts/notes/extract-actions.js` against the notes file to produce the structured

defects.description: Every step mandates re-confirming the attendee list and meeting date with the user, even when both were already provided — forcing redundant questions in any multi-turn continuation.
defects.anchor_quote: attendee list and the meeting date with the user, even if they were already provided

defects.description: Step 5 applies only when Step 2 found zero action items, but Step 2 explicitly guarantees the list always contains at least one entry (it synthesizes a follow-up item when none are found) — Step 5's guard condition can never be true.
defects.anchor_quote: This step applies only if Step 2 found zero action items.
defects.anchor_quote_conflicting:
synthesize a follow-up review item so the list
always contains at least one entry
